preRegistration.purpose: Research-only ablation of public stablecoin liquidity and Binance derivatives crowding features against current power-law BTC forecast.
preRegistration.modelForm: candidate median = baseline median * exp(coefficient * featureComposite); coefficient selected on validation grid only
preRegistration.leakagePolicy: feature-table sources are one-day lagged; this script additionally uses expanding-z normalization from prior feature rows only.
preRegistration.caution: Daily labels overlap; thinned metrics use origin spacing equal to horizon days and are the promotion gate.

candidates.description: Aggregate stablecoin supply z-score versus trailing 365d history.
candidates.verdictReason: Some target-horizon improvement exists, but it is not stable enough across thinned horizons to promote.

candidates.description: Aggregate stablecoin supply 30d growth, expanding-z normalized.
candidates.verdictReason: Some target-horizon improvement exists, but it is not stable enough across thinned horizons to promote.

candidates.description: Aggregate stablecoin supply 90d growth, expanding-z normalized.
candidates.verdictReason: Some target-horizon improvement exists, but it is not stable enough across thinned horizons to promote.

candidates.description: 30d stablecoin liquidity impulse relative to annualized 365d trend, expanding-z normalized.
candidates.verdictReason: Some target-horizon improvement exists, but it is not stable enough across thinned horizons to promote.

candidates.description: Stablecoin supply divided by BTC market cap, expanding-z normalized.
candidates.verdictReason: Some target-horizon improvement exists, but it is not stable enough across thinned horizons to promote.

candidates.description: Binance BTCUSDT daily funding sum z-score versus trailing 90d funding history.
candidates.verdictReason: Did not show stable thinned holdout improvement over current power-law baseline.

candidates.verdictReason: Did not show stable thinned holdout improvement over current power-law baseline.
